bezeichnung: Integration of Homogenous Lattice Structure in ClassCAD
lernziele:
• Understanding the construction of lattice structure in additive manufacturing modeling.
  • Design, program, and analyze of lattice structure modeling in ClassCAD system.
vorausgKenntnisse: Geometry, Visual Computing, Computer Graphics or an equivalent class. Experience in C/C++ programming language and ClassCAD interpreter programming. Background knowledge in 3D modeling and computational geometry.

kurse.lernziele:
• Understanding of basic algorithms and data structures for 3D modeling.
  •  Learn how to design, program, and analyze algorithms and systems for geometry processing in 3D modeling.
kurse.planinhalt:
• Methods for processing 3D surfaces geometry, mathematical representation, and algorithms
  • Surface modeling based on meshes, improvement of meshes, modification, and handling the data.
kurse.bibliographie: Botsch, Kobbelt, Pauly, Alliez, Levy: Polygon Mesh Processing
kurse.empfLehrmittel:
• Slides and course notes
  • Self-study using lectures’ videos and literatures

kurse.bezeichnung: Integration of Homogenous Lattice Structure in ClassCAD
kurse.lernziele:
• Understanding the construction of lattice structure in additive manufacturing modeling.
  • Design, program, and analyze of lattice structure modeling in ClassCAD system.
kurse.planinhalt:
• Advancements in additive manufacturing respective the increase of lattice structure.
  • Construction of lattice structure, from basic mathematical to the implementation in CAD systems.
  • ClassCAD modelling possibilities.
  • Lattice structure design, parameterization, and implementation.
  • Evaluation of lattice structure modelling in some CAD systems.
kurse.leistungsnachweis: Das zu bearbeitende Projekt wird mittels Bericht und Präsentation bewertet.
